'''Urukabb''' was a [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] manufacturer of aquatic vehicles. They manufactured the [[utility sub]],<ref name="JASB" /> [[Submarine Transport]],<ref name="RoE" /> and the [[Typhoon-2 Submersible Vehicle]].<ref name="WHSV" />

{{Company-stub}}
